artPrompt: The breathless moment a coin spins in the air above a felt table while a single die tumbles below it, players' clenched fists hovering in the smoky gloom around the rigged layout, hot-gold light blazing from one carnival lamp. The wide frame stacks the suspended coin high over the scattered stakes, embers drifting through the dark, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Place Your Bets
text: Each player secretly bets 'heads' or 'odd' by hiding a token in a fist. Then flip a coin and roll a six-sided die. Each player who guessed both correctly draws a card. Each player who guessed neither loses 2 life. You, the house, draw a card no matter what.
flavorText: "Bets down! No more bets! ...okay one more bet. No more bets!"
